stories.title: Fix install.sh statusline prompt for curl-pipe installs

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Statusline prompt does not run when install.sh is piped via curl
acceptance_criteria.verify: Run: echo 'test' | bash install.sh — should not attempt to invoke install-statusline.sh

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Statusline prompt works when install.sh is run directly from the repo
acceptance_criteria.verify: Run: bash install.sh from repo root — should offer statusline install after main install
Read install.sh, confirm the read -p block is wrapped in an if [[ -t 0 ]] guard

stories.title: Fix raw .env export in check-deploy, check-integrations, verify-all

acceptance_criteria.criterion: check-deploy.sh strips quotes and CRLF from .env values
acceptance_criteria.verify: Create .env with DATABASE_URL="postgres://x" (quoted), run check-deploy.sh, confirm no parse error

acceptance_criteria.criterion: check-integrations.sh strips quotes and CRLF from .env values
verify-all.sh strips quotes and CRLF from .env values
All 3 scripts use the same safe .env parsing as check-database.sh
acceptance_criteria.verify: Diff the .env parsing blocks — they should match check-database.sh lines 25-33

stories.title: Add tested label auto-creation in test skill Trello path

acceptance_criteria.criterion: test.skill.md documents creating the 'tested' label if it does not exist on the board
acceptance_criteria.verify: Read test.skill.md Step 5 Trello section, confirm it has a create-if-missing flow

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Label creation uses POST /1/boards/{id}/labels with name=tested and color=green
acceptance_criteria.verify: Read the curl command in test.skill.md

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Empty TESTED_LABEL triggers creation instead of silently failing
acceptance_criteria.verify: Read test.skill.md, confirm there is an if-empty check before the POST to /1/cards/{id}/idLabels

stories.title: Add Ollama unavailability fallback in review skill

acceptance_criteria.criterion: review.skill.md documents graceful degradation when Ollama is unavailable
acceptance_criteria.verify: Read review.skill.md Step 7, confirm it has a fallback section

acceptance_criteria.criterion: When Ollama fails, council degrades to Claude-only review (1 reviewer)
acceptance_criteria.verify: Read review.skill.md, confirm the fallback says to proceed with Claude analysis only

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Council verdict notes when running in degraded mode
acceptance_criteria.verify: Read review.skill.md, confirm council report format includes a note like '(degraded: Ollama unavailable)'

stories.title: Validate board exists via API in plan/build board confirmation

acceptance_criteria.criterion: plan.skill.md Step 0 fetches board name from API to confirm, not from stale config
acceptance_criteria.verify: Read plan.skill.md Step 0, confirm it calls GET /1/boards/{id}?fields=name to get the live name

acceptance_criteria.criterion: build.skill.md Step 1b does the same API validation
acceptance_criteria.verify: Read build.skill.md Step 1b, confirm it calls the Trello API to validate the board

acceptance_criteria.criterion: If board_id is invalid (deleted/moved), skill falls back to board listing
acceptance_criteria.verify: Read both skill files, confirm they handle 404/invalid board by re-listing

stories.title: Fix install-statusline.sh jq dependency message portability

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Error message provides install instructions for multiple platforms
acceptance_criteria.verify: Read install-statusline.sh, confirm it says 'brew install jq' on macOS, 'apt install jq' on Linux

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Platform detection uses uname to choose the right instruction
acceptance_criteria.verify: Read install-statusline.sh, confirm it checks $(uname) for Darwin vs Linux
